notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-387 — Housekeeping build, in step with the customer app. The 🪤 Trail button on every holding (add a trailing stop after buying — the stop rises with the price, never falls) is here on mobile and desktop. Note: the portfolio 🗑 Delete-holding tool stays OFF on the tester build by design — it's a customer-only way to clear a wrong position. Practice money only. Feedback via the ✉ link, top-left.
